mapper.select: SELECT survey_template_id, company_id, name, stage, manager_only, status, created_by, created_at, updated_at, description, version, is_default, target_role, coalesce(purpose, 'ONBOARDING_FEEDBACK') as purpose FROM survey_templates WHERE survey_template_id = #{surveyTemplateId} AND company_id = #{companyId} LIMIT 1

SELECT COUNT(1) FROM survey_templates st WHERE st.company_id = #{companyId} AND coalesce(st.purpose, 'ONBOARDING_FEEDBACK') = 'MANAGER_EVALUATION' AND upper(st.stage) = 'COMPLETED' AND upper(st.target_role) = 'MANAGER'

SELECT st.survey_template_id, st.company_id, st.name, coalesce(st.purpose, 'ONBOARDING_FEEDBACK') as purpose, st.stage, st.target_role, st.status, st.is_default, COUNT(sq.survey_question_id) as question_count FROM survey_templates st LEFT JOIN survey_questions sq ON sq.company_id = st.company_id AND sq.survey_template_id = st.survey_template_id WHERE st.company_id = #{companyId} AND coalesce(st.purpose, 'ONBOARDING_FEEDBACK') = 'MANAGER_EVALUATION' AND upper(st.stage) = 'COMPLETED' AND upper(st.target_role) = 'MANAGER' AND st.is_default = true AND upper(st.status) = 'ACTIVE' GROUP BY st.survey_template_id, st.company_id, st.name, st.purpose, st.stage, st.target_role, st.status, st.is_default ORDER BY st.created_at DESC LIMIT 1

SELECT st.survey_template_id, st.company_id, st.name, coalesce(st.purpose, 'ONBOARDING_FEEDBACK') as purpose, st.stage, st.target_role, st.status, st.is_default, COUNT(sq.survey_question_id) as question_count FROM survey_templates st LEFT JOIN survey_questions sq ON sq.company_id = st.company_id AND sq.survey_template_id = st.survey_template_id WHERE st.company_id = #{companyId} AND st.survey_template_id = #{surveyTemplateId} AND coalesce(st.purpose, 'ONBOARDING_FEEDBACK') = 'MANAGER_EVALUATION' AND upper(st.stage) = 'COMPLETED' AND upper(st.target_role) = 'MANAGER' AND upper(st.status) = 'ACTIVE' GROUP BY st.survey_template_id, st.company_id, st.name, st.purpose, st.stage, st.target_role, st.status, st.is_default LIMIT 1

select * from survey_templates where company_id = #{companyId} and upper(stage) = upper(#{stage}) and upper(target_role) = upper(#{targetRole}) and is_default = true and upper(status) = 'ACTIVE' order by created_at desc limit 1
mapper.update:
update survey_templates set is_default = false, updated_at = current_timestamp where company_id = #{companyId} and upper(stage) = upper(#{stage}) and upper(target_role) = upper(#{targetRole}) and is_default = true
and survey_template_id <> #{excludeTemplateId}
